text.title: Project Closure Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from `01-core-rules.xml`. Every leaf is a `conclusion` element referencing a rule id; this ensures the tree stays in lock-step with the rule set.

decision-tree.root-question: Are deliverables testable + sponsor available + ops ready?

conclusion.verdict: Use cancellation playbook or wait for readiness

branch.when: preconditions == true AND acceptance_signed == true AND lessons_captured == false
preconditions == true AND acceptance_signed == true AND lessons_captured == true AND handover_signed == false
preconditions == true AND acceptance_signed == true AND lessons_captured == true AND handover_signed == true

example.trace: preconditions=true → acceptance_signed=true → lessons_captured=true → handover_signed=true → archived → closed.
